fields.name: input
fields.label: Input File
fields.description: Path to the OSCAL document to convert.

fields.name: to
fields.label: Target Format
fields.description: Choose the output format to convert into.

fields.name: output
fields.label: Output File
fields.description: Optional path to write the converted document. Leave empty to print to stdout.

fields.name: overwrite
fields.label: Overwrite Existing Output
fields.description: Allow overwriting an existing output file.
